response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years experience requirement with 15+ years of full-stack development, strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work at re:cinq and Optilyz, and direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators). Background covers backend, frontend, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited recent Kotlin/Java experience, but the breadth and craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD) make this a strong match worth interviewing.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, pairing, CI/CD, and trunk-based development; also teaches/mentors via workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Limited recent Kotlin/Java experience; secondary-language work is older (Altom, robotic arms)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may not transfer directly to the required stack
